chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl. No.1705 of 2024 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For hearing of bail application. 08.10.2024. Mr. Nazim Baig, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, Addl. Prosecutor General Sindh. ------------------------------ Learned counsel for the applicant would be satisfied if this Court gave directions to the trial Court to complete the trial within 03 months of the date of this order. Learned Addl. P.G. has no objection to this proposition. Order accordingly. Copy of this order shall be sent to Additional Sessions Judge-V (West) Karachi for compliance. The instant criminal application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE
